Jordan has maintained a neutral stance in the Gaza conflict. While opposing Israeli aggression and sending humanitarian aid to Gaza, it also intercepted Iranian missiles to protect its own sovereignty—not to defend Israel. Jordan neither supports Hamas nor Iran militarily and aims to stay out of regional escalation.

Using the YouTube map template is not applicable here. There were more strikes than shown, it doesn't show interceptions, it doesn't show the abstract concept of US UK French intervention and militia support. Iraq is not pro-Iranian, it's mixed. And anyway, as much as this is a military conflict, it is a political one, and cannot be represented by a map like this. It is better to show a single non-map image of a meeting that shows political anxiety.
